fields.title: [repo-guidance][rule-api] Import child rule-target configs and generate nested workspace agent files
[repo-guidance][rule-api] Import child rule-target configs and generate nested workspace agent files

fields.implementation_summary: Added recursive rule-target config imports, migrated nested .github agent files in memory-viewers, memory-api, and viewer-api to canonical rule generation, and validated sync-targets plus --check across child and parent configs. Remaining duplication: child AGENTS.md targets for memory-api and viewer-api still stay root-owned because their shared AGENTS rules are not yet split into those child stores.
fields.title: [repo-guidance][rule-api] Import child rule-target configs and generate nested workspace agent files

fields.implementation_summary: Added recursive rule-target config imports with config-relative output resolution, migrated nested .github/agents files in memory-viewers, memory-api, and viewer-api to canonical rule generation, split child AGENTS.md ownership into the memory-viewers, memory-api, and viewer-api stores, narrowed the remaining memory-viewers shared AGENTS scopes to parent-owned workspaces, and validated ./target/debug/rule.exe sync-targets plus --check for memory-viewers/memory-api/rule-targets.yaml, memory-viewers/viewer-api/rule-targets.yaml, memory-viewers/rule-targets.yaml, and rule-targets.yaml after rebuilding rule-cli.
fields.title: [repo-guidance][rule-api] Import child rule-target configs and generate nested workspace agent files

fields.implementation_summary: Added recursive rule-target config imports with config-relative output resolution, migrated nested .github/agents files in memory-viewers, memory-api, and viewer-api to canonical rule generation, split child AGENTS.md ownership into the memory-viewers, memory-api, and viewer-api stores, narrowed the remaining memory-viewers shared AGENTS scopes to parent-owned workspaces, and validated ./target/debug/rule.exe sync-targets plus --check for memory-viewers/memory-api/rule-targets.yaml, memory-viewers/viewer-api/rule-targets.yaml, memory-viewers/rule-targets.yaml, and rule-targets.yaml after rebuilding rule-cli.
